title: nvm_list: capacity hint uses implicit first-iteration guard
description: In nvm.rs nvm_list, the capacity reservation 'if ids.is_empty() { ids.reserve(out_count) }' uses ids.is_empty() as an implicit 'first iteration' flag. The reader has to understand that ids starts empty and the hint is only useful before any pushes. Rewrite: hoist the capacity hint by restructuring the first call outside the loop, or replace the guard with an explicit 'let mut capacity_hinted = false' bool. Either makes the once-only intent explicit rather than relying on the list starting empty.
